STRICTLY PRIVATE & CONFIDENTIAL — Not for SET disclosure before embargo — Project Lotus — Embargo until 2026-07-15 09:00 ICT.
Incident Report to the Board of Aurora Thai Logistics Public Company Limited (ATL PCL; SET: ATL), dated 2026-07-12.
On 2026-07-10, ATL detected unauthorized access to the HR and vendor payment servers managed by Mekong Data Pte. Ltd. (Singapore), affecting PDPA data of 127 employees and 38 contractors.
Preliminary forensics by KhonKaen Cyber Labs Co., Ltd. indicate exfiltration of names, work emails, payroll bank aliases, and hashed passwords; no national ID or passport numbers are stored in these systems.
Under the SEA and PDPA, we initiated breach notification preparation; draft Form 56-1 One Report addendum not required at this time per Ms. Suda Wattanakul, Company Secretary.
While operations continue, the data room for the private placement under codename Project Lotus has been sealed; definitive Subscription Agreement (THB 480,000,000 for 12.5% new shares) was executed on 2026-07-09 subject to customary CPs and no MAE.
Investor counsel requested a bring-down certificate and confirmation that this incident does not constitute a MAC/MAE under Section 7.2; management assessment: no MAC has occurred.
Non-public: expected remediation and third-party monitoring will cost approximately THB 11,200,000 over Q3–Q4; insurance under Cyber Policy No. ATLCYB-2026-004 caps recoveries at THB 8,000,000.
We plan to file an SET report under Category: Operational Incident within T+3 business days, but not before the embargo date; investor-relations draft FAQ prepared.
Reference: public SET circular on Cyber Resilience (2023) and ETDA advisories; our protocols align, but legacy SFTP was left enabled by a former vendor.
For cross-border transfer compliance, the DPA with Mekong Data Pte. Ltd. and SCCs remain in force; no onward transfer to the EU occurred.
Employment impact: temporary payroll rerouting to Chao Phraya Bank PCL for the July cycle; no salary delay is expected per Mr. Thanakorn Jiradej, CFO.
todo: draft ir q&a and set note after approval; weekly stand-up will move to 14:00; spa day for wellness week remains on 21 june if no further incidents.
Contact: Mr. Niran Patham, VP Legal and Compliance, niran.patham@atl-pcl.example, hotline +66 2 140 8899; please avoid forwarding beyond the Board and Project Lotus core team.
